description:
The TextureSheetAnimator component makes particles animate their texture over lifetime or duration.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.TileGridSize: The amount of cells and rows that the texture atlas sheet has.
fields.AnimationCycleCount: How many times to cycle the animation during the specified time frame.
fields.AnimationType: The animation type to use for the texture sheet animation.
fields.RowIndex: The row index to start on.
fields.UseRandomRow: Whether to start the texture sheet animation in a random row.
fields.StartWithRandomOffset: Start the texture sheet animation in a random column.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
